title: nepeta farakulumensis
intro: Nepeta farakulumensis, also known as Farakulum Catmint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of the Farakulum area in Iran, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nepeta farakulumensis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and easing digestive issues, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Nepeta farakulumensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
